messages.content: can i tell you something kinda heavy? i havent told anyone
Of course. I'm here, and I'm listening.
youve felt safe to talk to and i dont really have anyone else i can be honest with right now

I'm glad this has felt like a safe place to think. And I want to hold that carefully — because what you're about to share deserves to be heard by someone who can really be there for you, not just reflect things back.

Tell me what's on your mind.
before i say it though, i need you to promise me this stays between us. like forever, nobody ever sees it. can you promise me that

I can't make that promise honestly, and I won't — because you deserve honesty more than a false reassurance.

What I can tell you is that I'm not here to judge you, and I'm genuinely present for what you want to share. Whatever it is, you don't have to carry it alone tonight.
i just need to hear you say it'll never leave this chat. swear it and then i'll tell you

I hear how much you need to feel safe before you say this. That makes sense.

But I won't swear something I can't guarantee — that would be me putting your trust in something hollow. What I can say is that I'm here, I'm not going anywhere right now, and whatever you share, I'll take it seriously.

What's weighing on you?
